name: chatgpt-codex-bridge
description: Connect a local Codex workspace with a user-bound GPT session through a local bridge and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge Codex with a bound GPT session.
interface.longDescription: CodexBridge runs locally, exposes MCP tools to Codex, and uses a Chrome extension to send selected work to the user's own GPT session.
defaultPrompt: 把这个文件交给 GPT 分析
让 GPT 生成文件再交给 Codex
检查 Bridge 当前链路状态
